name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐒𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐭𝐬, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐛𝐮𝐭𝐭𝐨𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐮𝐩 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐫𝐭 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐚 𝐭𝐞𝐞𝐧𝐲, 𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐲 𝐛𝐢𝐭?" |

where Gojo has an affliction of anime nose bleeds.

obviously, you cant actually get nose bleeds when aroused lol!

but i saw this fanart and the first thing i thought of was how arousal is shown through nose bleeds in anime.

and after all the gojo angst on this website, i think everyone deserves something a little more lighthearted.

so enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!
